string 2:
Oh, there you are! I got a tip that a cosplayer went missing
here.
{next}Maybe a Digimon did it.
{next}Maybe a kidnapper did it.
{next}Maybe the cosplayer was spirited away.

Yeah. That "ghost" that's been sighted a lot lately is
pretty suspect, if you ask me.

That's the most realistic possibility, right? We should
consider contacting the police.

This park is pretty well-known, so while it may not be the most discrete 
move... ...the story might go viral if I cover it on my channel.

Anyway, I'd love to hear more details. I'm meeting the
tipster here. Do you wanna wait?
{next}Sure, I'll wait.
{end}I need to take care of other business.

Okay. In the meantime, let's keep our eyes peeled for
anything sus.
No problem. I'll be here, so let me know when you're done.
Hello. Thank you so much for helping me look for my friend!

Of course! Well, let's get right to it. Tell us everything
you know about the case.

Okay. Let's see... She was cosplaying here right around this
time.
{next}Wasn't she cold?
{next}Why here?
{next}Did she get hit on?

Putting up with the heat and cold is part of cosplay. That's
what she always said.

I guess because there's a lot of photogenic spots around
here.

There aren't a lot of people at this time, and she said they
would just run from her.
I see... By the way, what kind of cosplay was she doing?

Uh... Oh, I remember! She was dressed in a costume just like
your friend's, there.

Like my friend's? That should make things easier... Put this
on and walk over there.
{next}If someone walked around the park wearing this...
{next}So you're trying to make me the bait?
{next}You wear it.
Maybe reenacting the case would help solve the mystery.

I wouldn't have put it quite like that, but basically, yes.
I'm sure you'll do great.
Unfortunately, it's a little too small for me.

Thanks! We'll try walking around the park in the Chosen 
Children outfit, then.
Thank you so much. And please be careful!

Let's try walking around the park in the Chosen Children 
outfit.
I'm sensing something... Could this be it?!
What the...? H-Hey! It's sucking us in! Aaaaagh!
Where are we...?
Eeek! Wait... Are you guys... humans?
{next}We're not dangerous.
{next}Can you get up?
{next}Boo! We're ghosts...
That's right. Your friend asked us to look for you!

I'm not sure where to find my footing in this space... but 
I don't think I'm injured.
Stop joking around! Please don't worry. We're humans.

Run! You have to get out of here! That monster is going to
be back soon!
Monster? What monster...?
All right! I finally caught a tamer!
...Wait. Why're there so many?
{next}Did you just call me a "tamer"?
{next}What's a tamer?
{next}That's right. I'm a tamer.

Yeah, right! You're running around with Digimon. That makes
you a tamer!

A human that brings Digimon around with 'em, like you do.
Talk about clueless!
I knew it from the get-go! Not like you could ever hide it!

Trying to run? Well, that ain't happening! If you get away,
my master is gonna be fuming!

Well, we managed to win somehow... I wonder who this
master is.
You've been here a while. Do you have any idea?

No, I only saw that one monster... Uh, sorry, but who are
you guys...?
{next}We're your allies.
{next}A streamer and her assistant.
{next}Superheroes.

Yeah, that's a good answer. She's probably feeling confused,
so let's reassure her.
Oh? When did I get an assistant? Hee hee! Thanks.

Hee hee. Oh, come on. How old are we? But, actually... that
doesn't sound too bad.
Like I said, your friend asked us to look for you.

But we can talk about that later. First, let's get out of
this—
Whoa! What's going on?! We're being... pulled somewhere...?
Aaaaaaaaagh!
Is this...?
Tomoyo! I was so worried about you!

Phew! I guess we got thrown out of that place. Thankfully,
everything worked out!
{next}Good thing no one was hurt.
{next}We still don't know who this "master" is.
{next}I think we deserve a reward.

Yeah, that's a relief. And I'm so glad we were able to save
her friend!

Yeah. there must be a boss that's ordering the search
and capture these so-called "tamers."

Well, aren't you the greedy one? But it's true that we did
go through a lot this time.
This is for taking on my request. Please accept it.

What was all that, anyway...? Was I having a bad dream or
something...?

Yeah, I'm sure it was all just a dream. You should forget
about it and rest for now.
{next}Well, there they go.
{next}That was no dream...
{next}Let's go home and get some sleep.

They didn't seem to know anything, so just letting them go
home was the thing to do.

Yeah, that was definitely real. Digimon are setting traps in
this park to capture humans!
Hee hee! Yeah, let's call it a day.

I'm going back to the office to edit today's video. Strike
while the iron is hot, right?
Well, see ya later!
Call Hiroko to start her investigation?
{next}[Call her.]
{end}I'm too busy right now.
